form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 4 length second (22.38) over 390m at this track and making it two placings on end. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by 2.25 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a slick 22.24 over the 390m trip. Top win and looms as a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (22.49) behind Croydon in a Free For All on April 1. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.94) when eighth over 390m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Box stats strong with six wins and five placings from 15 starts. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 0.8 lengths second but did clock a decent 22.19 over the 390m journey. Rates on top here on the time from last run.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Warren's Ledger at Geelong last start over 400m (22.76). Has good early speed and will stick on.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Mt Gambier (17.77) in a Grade 2/3/4, finishing a 6 length third. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from 12 starts. Has ability and should be around the money.
